name: pi-context-tree
description: Git-style /branch /merge /crop workflow + context panel for pi sessions

scripts.build: npm run build -w @pi-context-tree/core && npm run build -w @pi-context-tree/tui && npm run build -w @pi-context-tree/pitree
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.check: npm run check:types && npm run check:lint
scripts.check:types: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/tui/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/extension/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/pitree/tsconfig.json --noEmit
